name: ai-tools-mcp
description: Perplexity Sonar (quick), Sonar Pro (deep), and Agent API Search-as-Code (bulk) research, Google Gemini Deep Research (async, long-form reports), local Ollama delegation, and local conversation-session persistence — exposed as 13 MCP tools.
long_description: Five families of tools: (1) quick_research uses Perplexity Sonar for fast single-source citation-backed answers, and deep_research uses Sonar Pro for inline multi-source synthesis. (2) agent_research drives Perplexity's Agent API with the sandbox tool (Search as Code): a hosted agent writes and runs code that searches programmatically, covering every item in bulk/enumerable research tasks — synchronous or background via agent_research_result polling. (3) gemini_deep_research_start/_result run long-form research tasks (5–60 minutes) on Google's Deep Research model and poll for results. (4) local_delegate sends a task to a local-first Ollama endpoint chain — input stays on your own machines: on-device when localhost serves the model, otherwise only your own Cloudflare-Access-gated endpoint, never a third-party API — synchronously or in the background via local_delegate_result polling. (5) list/save/load/update/delete_session persist conversations to ~/.claude/sessions/ with secret redaction at the boundary.

uv_path.title: Path to uv binary
uv_path.description: Absolute path to your uv binary (PEP 723 inline-deps runner). Find yours with `which uv` in Terminal. The default works for Homebrew installs on Apple Silicon.

ollama_endpoints.title: Ollama endpoint chain
ollama_endpoints.description: Comma-separated ordered list of Ollama endpoints, local first

default_model.title: Default delegate model
default_model.description: Optional: pin the default delegate model (must be on the allowlist). Leave blank to use the first entry of the model allowlist.

ollama_models.title: Ollama model allowlist
ollama_models.description: Comma-separated model tags local_delegate may use; first entry is the default model. Leave blank for the built-in qwen3.6 tags. On constrained machines set e.g. 'qwen2.5-coder:14b,qwen3.6:35b-a3b-coding-nvfp4' so small tasks run locally and qwen requests fall through to the remote chain.

tools.name: quick_research
tools.description: Perplexity Sonar — fast, concise, citation-backed answers for well-scoped questions (inline, a few seconds, cheaper than deep_research).

tools.name: deep_research
tools.description: Perplexity Sonar Pro deep research with multi-source synthesis and citations (inline, seconds).

tools.name: agent_research
tools.description: Perplexity Agent API Search-as-Code — a hosted sandbox agent searches programmatically for bulk/enumerable research tasks (synchronous by default, or background=true returns a response_id).

tools.name: agent_research_result
tools.description: Poll a background agent_research task by response_id (formatted answer when completed).

tools.name: gemini_deep_research_start
tools.description: Start an asynchronous Google Gemini Deep Research task (returns interaction_id; poll with _result).

tools.name: gemini_deep_research_result
tools.description: Poll a Gemini Deep Research task by interaction_id (status, output_text when completed).

tools.name: local_delegate
tools.description: Delegate a task to the local Ollama qwen3.6 coding model via a local-first endpoint chain — input stays on your own machines: on-device when localhost serves the model, otherwise only your own Access-gated endpoint, never a third-party API (synchronous by default, or background=true returns a job_id).

tools.name: local_delegate_result
tools.description: Poll a background local_delegate job by job_id (single-collect: retrieving the result clears the job).

tools.name: list_sessions
tools.description: List all saved conversation sessions, most recent first.

tools.name: save_session
tools.description: Persist the current conversation to ~/.claude/sessions/<uuid>.json with secret redaction.

tools.name: load_session
tools.description: Load a previously saved session by UUID.

tools.name: update_session
tools.description: Rename a saved session and bump its last_modified timestamp.

tools.name: delete_session
tools.description: Permanently delete a saved session by UUID.
